---
title: Fun R Things
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: render-fun_R
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis

library(yaml)
library(htmltools)

# Read YAML data
items <- yaml::read_yaml("data/fun_r.yml")

# Build cards
cards <- lapply(items, function(row){

  links <- row[["links"]]
  link_nodes <- list()

  # Build links (emoji comes from YAML key)
  if (!is.null(links)) {
    for (nm in names(links)) {
      url <- links[[nm]]

      if (!is.null(url) && nzchar(url)) {
        link_nodes <- c(
          link_nodes,
          tags$a(
            nm,                      # 👈 text from YAML (already has emoji)
            href = url,
            target = "_blank"
          )
        )
      }
    }
  }

  # Card layout
  tags$div(
    class = "card",
    tags$div(
      tags$h3(row[["title"]]),
      tags$div(class = "meta", row[["type"]])
    ),
    tags$p(row[["description"]]),
    tags$div(class = "links", link_nodes)
  )
})

# Render all cards
div(class = "card-grid", cards)

```
